channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Rosalía’s Lux Tour Merch Includes A Novel Hoodie
item.description: 🌟 Stay cozy in style with Rosalía's new Lux Tour hoodie! 🎵✨ #FashionFriday #Rosalía #LuxTour

item.title: BMG Sues Anthropic for Alleged Training of Chatbot With Justin Bieber, Bruno Mars, Rolling Stones Lyrics
item.description: 🎶 Lawsuit alert! BMG sues Anthropic over chatbot trained with Bieber, Mars, Stones lyrics 😱🤖 Let's see how this melody unfolds! 🎵 #MusicNews

item.title: Niall Horan Wants to Invite You to a ‘Dinner Party’ With New Album Announcement
item.description: 🎉 Get ready to RSVP to Niall Horan's 'Dinner Party' album announcement! 🍽️🎶 Who's bringing the tunes? #NiallHoran #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Passion Pit Announce 2026 Summer Tour, Tease New EP
item.description: 🎉 Summer 2026 just got hotter! 🔥 Passion Pit is hitting the road and bringing new tunes along! 🎶 #PassionPitTour2026

item.title: Olympia, WA’s Some Velvet Sidewalk announce 1st album in nearly 30 years, share “Don’t Fuck With Your Luck”
item.description: Guess who's back?! 🎉 Olympia legends Some Velvet Sidewalk drop new album after 3 decades! 🎶🔥 #SVScomeback
